case_title: LEE POLLAK ET AL VS. PUBLIC STORAGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,300.00 FILED BY POLLAK, LEE POLLAK LEVY, DEBORAH AS TO DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DEREK COFFILL FILED BY DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE . APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DEBORAH POLLAK IS PRESENT AND PLAINTIFF LEE POLLAK IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE IS PRESENT APPEARING IN COURT IS DEREK COFFILL. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POLLAK, LEE POLLAK LEVY, DEBORAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,135.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
